steps: Log in with your Oura account (create one at https://ouraring.com if needed)
Enter your application name, website URL, and redirect URIs
Submit the form to receive your Client ID and Client Secret
Copy both credentials — the Client Secret will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: Your Oura OAuth2 application client ID

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: Your Oura OAuth2 application client secret

notes: Oura API access requires an active Oura Ring and membership
OAuth2 authorization code flow is used — each user must consent individually
Scopes include: email, personal, daily, heartrate, workout, tag, session, spo2, ring_configuration, sleep

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's personal profile information
